subject: refactor(theme): migrate all remaining screens to Uniwind + DaisyUI
body:
Convert the final 8 files: Home screen, Station detail, FuelMapWeb,
tabs layout, admin layout, admin login, 404 screen, and HTML wrapper.

All screen components now use useTheme() for DaisyUI semantic tokens.
FuelMapWeb passes theme hex values to Mapbox GL layer paint properties.
+html.tsx reads from THEME_HEX for body background and focus ring colors.

Only infrastructure files remain on old system (useAppTheme.ts, Colors.ts,
Themed.tsx) — these will be cleaned up in the next commit.

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, refactor, migration, mapbox
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: minor
